texts.full_text: age group of 10-24 years is about 36.50 crore, thus, every third person is young in the country. He said the latest data has showed that every fifth person in thNew Delhi: Union Home Minister Rajnath Singh on Thursday advocated for creating an atmosphere where adolescent and youth population of the country is able to pursue their goals and excel in their chosen fields. Inaugurating the World Population Day-2014 celebrations, Singh said there is an urgent need to address the concerns of adolescent and youth as India has one of the world's largest adolescent and youth populations. Singh highlighted that the total population of young persons aged 10-24 years in India stands at about 36.50 crore, which means that every third person is young within this age bracket across the count

texts.full_text: isplay optical gain, a parametric study was performed to ascertain which properties of the electronic potential curves of a heteronuclear diatomic molecule have the greatest effect on the suitability of that molecule as a potential electronic transition laser.In the study, the minimum reactive branching ratio required for a species to display optical gain was calculated as a function of the transition energy, the electronic transition oscillator strength, the ratio of the radiative transition rate to the collision rate, the electronic transition energy defect, the ratio of the collision rate to the reactive rate, the electronic transition Franck-Condon factor, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational matrix element, the electronic transition vibrational ma

texts.preview_head: by webmaster Guido on September 11, 2002 at 18:58:21: : : How Can I get the ASC code from any CHAR.: : Using CHR(65) the result is 'A'.: : In Clipper the function ASC do that ASC('A') result 65.In Del
texts.preview_tail: ple: ``` var c: Char; begin c := 'A'; ShowMessage(IntToStr(Ord(c))); // Displays "65" end; ``` This will display the ASCII code for the character 'A', which is 65. Alternatively, you can use the Ord()
texts.full_text: by webmaster Guido on September 11, 2002 at 18:58:21: : : How Can I get the ASC code from any CHAR.: : Using CHR(65) the result is 'A'.: : In Clipper the function ASC do that ASC('A') result 65.In Delphi, you can use the Ord() function to get the ASCII value of a character. For example: ``` var c: Char; begin c := 'A'; ShowMessage(IntToStr(Ord(c))); // Displays "65" end; ``` This will display the ASCII code for the character 'A', which is 65. Alternatively, you can use the Ord()

texts.full_text: s the music business is incredibly rewarding for me. Not to brag (well, maybe just a little) but I had the good fortune of hearing 311 (remember them?), Korn and Kid Rock before they hit the big time. This week I was given the opportunity to review the latest album from Denver's own Red Tide Rising. Horror Headlines: Wednesday, June 13th, 2012"Chuck" star Yvonne Strahovski has just been added to the cast of season 7 of "Dexter", bringing the show's Australian quotient officially up to par with 1. She'll play a young lass helping the Miami PD solve a homicide case while peaking Dexter's interest in her past. She'll also provide the entire cast with a direct line to delicious bloomin onions. French director Alain DesRochers has been tapped by the good folks at Millennium Films and Nu Image to direct their upcoming vampire flick "The Rising". The script follows a group of mercenaries as they travel around the jHorror. Horror H

photoBrowser.delegate = self; photoBrowser.currentImageIndex = indexPath.item; photoBrowser.imageCount = self.modelsArray.count; photoBrowser.sourceImagesContainerView = self.collectionView; [photoBrowser show];
